title: High stakes battle in Nokha as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Nokha. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.

title: Bihar Elections 2025: Key issues dominate debates in Nokha
snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Nokha assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.

title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Nokha
snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Nokha assembly segment.
